title: Remodeled Fence and Gates
description: Remodels all the different fence and fence gates using vanilla textures.
body:
![title](https://i.postimg.cc/J4t1Htsb/title-remodeledfence.png)
Changed every fence and fence gate to be more unique to it's tree type. Also changed the inventory icons to represent the new models.
![Oak Fence](https://i.postimg.cc/ZnCZRcH1/2025-05-22-00-57-51.png)
This pack changes the model of the following fence & gates:
Spoiler ![Inventory GUI](https://i.postimg.cc/jdntYMLf/icons3.png)
- Oak - Spruce - Birch - Jungle - Acacia - Dark Oak - Mangrove - Cherry - Pale Oak - Bamboo - Crimson - Warped - Nether Brick (fence)
![Acacia Fence](https://i.postimg.cc/Z5rmC0PK/2025-05-22-01-00-08.png)
If you have any feedback or any questions, the best place to reach me is on the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/Gf7uPVPHZh) ![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/mr9yt5k9/discord.png)
